summary: Excellent audience recording that immerses the listener and feels like being right there at the show.
review: The tape is praised as a great audience recording that captures the concert ambience vividly; the reviewer even prefers this version to other archive copies. No specific comments on the musical performance are given, so the show quality cannot be assessed from this review alone.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights an excellent audience recording, but provides no insight into the musical performance, limiting confidence in a full show rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and immersive sound; reviewer feels 'like I'm there' and prefers this copy over others on the archive.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments about set structure or performance were provided.
